items.name: [PBR] Fallen Wings: Golden Wings of Lost Glory
items.description:
Once symbols of divine power, these wings now shimmer with the haunting light of a fallen empire. Forged from the essence of celestial fire and bound by regret, they carry the echo of angels who defied the heavens. Their golden hue no longer reflects purity — but pride, loss, and the undying will to rise again.

Price: 1000/11 Stock
Purchase Game: https://www.roblox.com/games/73736600148167
